transcript: this is a 2016 Land Rover Discovery 4 it has a 3 l V6 Diesel with twin turbo and it is huge being 6'2 I actually have to step up into the car and when I'm getting out of it I kind of have to do a little H so if you're a fan of jaguar or Land Rover you will recognize this gear selector and what it does is when you start the car it actually raises up now the driver seat is in my position I'm 6'2 and as a re passenger there is ample room but KNE knee space is a little cramped but this specific car has seven seats and I hear in the back 6ft passengers so just fine now everyone loves glass in their roof and just to prove that you're not in poverty you have one two and three sunroofs [Music]
